prophecies.a: 「当铁鸟飞翔、铁马奔驰之时，藏人将如蚂蚁般流散世界各地，佛法将传入红人之地。」
prophecies.q_en: Iron birds fly and Dharma spreads West
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron bird flies and horses run on wheels, the Tibetan people will be scattered like ants across the world, and the Dharma will come to the land of the red-faced people."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1959年中国军队进入西藏后，达赖喇嘛及数万藏人流亡印度和世界各地。此后藏传佛教确实广泛传入欧美（红人之地），飞机（铁鸟）和汽车（铁马）已成为日常交通工具。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Chinese military entered Tibet in 1959, the Dalai Lama and tens of thousands of Tibetans fled to India and around the world. Tibetan Buddhism subsequently spread widely to Europe and America ('land of the red-faced people'), and airplanes ('iron birds') and cars ('iron horses') became everyday transportation.

prophecies.a: 「末法之时，五浊恶世将至：劫浊——饥荒与战乱频发；见浊——邪见横行，正法不彰；烦恼浊——众生贪嗔痴炽盛；众生浊——人寿渐短，福报渐薄；命浊——非时横死者众。」
prophecies.q_en: Five Degenerations of the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end of the Dharma, the Five Degenerations shall arise: degeneration of the kalpa — famine and war; degeneration of views — wrong views prevail, true Dharma fades; degeneration of afflictions — greed, hatred, and delusion intensify; degeneration of beings — lifespans shorten, merit dwindles; degeneration of life — untimely deaths multiply."

prophecies.a: 「当世界被蛮族之王统治、正法近乎消亡之时，香巴拉第二十五代国王仁钦扎波将率领香巴拉大军，与蛮族展开最终决战。正法将由此复兴，黄金时代降临。」
prophecies.a_en: "When the world is ruled by the barbarian king and the Dharma is nearly extinct, Raudra Chakrin, the 25th king of Shambhala, will lead the Shambhala army in the final battle against the barbarian forces. The Dharma shall be restored and a golden age will dawn."

prophecies.a: 「末法时代，弟子不敬上师，子女不孝父母。盗贼横行，欺诈成风。人们以恶为荣，以善为耻。持戒者被嘲笑，破戒者受崇拜。」
prophecies.q_en: Social chaos in the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end of the Dharma, disciples will disrespect their teachers, children will be unfilial to parents. Thieves will run rampant, fraud will become the norm. People will take pride in evil and shame in virtue. Those who keep precepts will be mocked, while those who break them will be worshipped."

prophecies.q: 莲师预言藏地寺院兴衰
prophecies.a: 「藏地将建起无数寺院，金顶辉煌。然而僧人徒有袈裟，内心空无修证。寺院成为聚财之所，佛法沦为买卖之物。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied the rise and fall of Tibetan monasteries
prophecies.a_en: "Countless monasteries with golden roofs will be built in Tibet. Yet monks will wear robes with empty hearts and no realization. Monasteries will become places for accumulating wealth, and the Dharma will be reduced to a commodity."

prophecies.q: 莲师预言末法时代科技
prophecies.a: 「人们将用铁盒子说话，千里之外也能交谈。铁鸟将在天空飞翔，铁蛇将在大地奔驰。人们足不出户便能知晓天下之事。」
prophecies.a_en: "People will speak through iron boxes and converse across thousands of miles. Iron birds will fly in the sky, iron snakes will race across the land. People will know the affairs of the world without leaving their homes."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 电话（铁盒子说话）、飞机（铁鸟）、火车（铁蛇）、互联网（足不出户知天下事）均已在20世纪成为现实。虽然这些预言的具体措辞在不同伏藏版本中有差异，但核心描述与现代科技高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Telephones ('iron boxes for talking'), airplanes ('iron birds'), trains ('iron snakes'), and the internet ('knowing the world without leaving home') all became reality in the 20th century. While exact wording varies across terma versions, the core descriptions closely match modern technology.

prophecies.a: 「当来自北方的铁路修到拉萨之时，便是藏人流散之始。雪域将遭受巨大苦难，寺院将变为军营，经典将被付之一炬。」
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron road from the north reaches Lhasa, the scattering of Tibetans will begin. The Land of Snows will suffer greatly, monasteries will become barracks, and scriptures will be set ablaze."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1950年代中国军队进入西藏后，大量寺院被毁或改作他用，经典遭焚毁。虽然青藏铁路2006年才通车，但1950年代已开始修建通往拉萨的公路。藏人从1959年起大规模流亡。预言的核心情节——北方铁路/公路与藏地浩劫——与历史事实基本吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Chinese military entered Tibet in the 1950s, numerous monasteries were destroyed or repurposed, and scriptures were burned. While the Qinghai-Tibet Railway opened in 2006, roads to Lhasa were built starting in the 1950s. Tibetans began their mass exodus in 1959. The prophecy's core elements — northern road/railway and Tibet's catastrophe — largely match historical events.

prophecies.a: 「在这个末法时代，人们的修行将只剩下嘴上功夫。口诵经文而内心散乱，穿着法衣而行为放逸。上师之间互相诽谤，弟子之间争名夺利。佛法将变成装饰品，而非解脱之道。」
prophecies.q_en: Dudjom Rinpoche's teaching on the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In this degenerate age, people's practice will be mere lip service. They will recite sutras with distracted minds, wear Dharma robes but act with indulgence. Teachers will slander each other, disciples will compete for fame and profit. The Dharma will become an ornament rather than a path to liberation."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 敦珠仁波切描述的现象——修行流于形式、佛法商业化、教派纷争——在当代藏传佛教圈确有体现。但同时也有大量真修实证的上师和道场存在，不可一概而论。
prophecies.verdict_en: The phenomena Dudjom Rinpoche described — practice becoming superficial, commercialization of Dharma, sectarian disputes — are indeed observable in contemporary Tibetan Buddhist circles. However, many authentic teachers and practice centers also exist, so a blanket assessment is not warranted.

prophecies.a: 「末法之时，四季失序：冬雷震震，夏雪纷飞。江河泛滥，大地龟裂。瘟疫流行，人畜共殃。星辰异位，日月无光。」
prophecies.q_en: Natural disasters in the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "In the end times, seasons will lose their order: thunder in winter, snow in summer. Rivers will flood, the earth will crack. Plagues will spread, afflicting both humans and animals. Stars will shift, sun and moon will lose their light."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 21世纪极端气候事件确实增多——反季节天气、洪涝干旱加剧、新冠疫情等。但「星辰异位、日月无光」等描述尚未出现。末法预言的自然灾异描述具有普遍性，各时代均可找到部分对应。
prophecies.verdict_en: Extreme weather events have indeed increased in the 21st century — unseasonal weather, intensifying floods and droughts, COVID-19 pandemic, etc. However, descriptions like 'stars shifting' and 'sun and moon losing light' have not occurred. The natural disaster descriptions in end-of-Dharma prophecies are generic enough to find partial matches in any era.

prophecies.q: 时轮金刚预言蛮族入侵
prophecies.a: 「蛮族之王将统一不信佛法的势力，以武力征服世界。他们将摧毁寺院、禁止修行、迫害僧众。正法几近断灭，唯有香巴拉保存法脉不绝。」
prophecies.a_en: "The barbarian king will unite forces that reject the Dharma, conquering the world by force. They will destroy monasteries, prohibit practice, and persecute monks. The true Dharma will nearly be extinguished, with only Shambhala preserving the lineage unbroken."

prophecies.q: 莲师预言末法时代道德
prophecies.a: 「父不慈、子不孝，夫妻如仇敌同住。人人只顾眼前利益，不问因果报应。食物虽多而无营养，衣裳虽华而心寒冷。朋友因利而聚，利尽则散。」
prophecies.a_en: "Fathers will be unkind, children unfilial, spouses will live together like enemies. Everyone will pursue immediate gain, ignoring karma. Food will be abundant but lack nourishment, clothing will be splendid but hearts will be cold. Friends will gather for profit and scatter when it is gone."

prophecies.q: 时轮金刚预言正法复兴
prophecies.a: 「香巴拉大战之后，正法将重新照耀世间。人寿增至八万岁，五谷丰登，疾病消退。弥勒菩萨将降生人间，转大法轮，开启新的黄金时代。」
prophecies.a_en: "After the Great Shambhala War, the true Dharma will illuminate the world once more. Human lifespan will increase to 80,000 years, harvests will be bountiful, diseases will recede. Maitreya Bodhisattva will be born into the human realm, turn the great Dharma wheel, and inaugurate a new golden age."

prophecies.a: 「我将法宝埋藏于山岩、湖底、虚空之中。当众生因缘成熟之时，掘藏师将应运而生，取出伏藏利益有情。每一部伏藏都是为特定时代的特定众生而设。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava prophesied the revelation of terma
prophecies.a_en: "I have concealed Dharma treasures within mountains, beneath lakes, and in the sky. When the karma of beings ripens, tertöns will appear to retrieve the terma for the benefit of sentient beings. Each terma is designed for specific beings in a specific era."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 自11世纪起，藏传佛教确实出现了数百位掘藏师（tertön），从各地取出伏藏教法。著名的掘藏师包括娘热·尼玛沃色（11世纪）、秋吉林巴（19世纪）等。伏藏传统延续至今，是宁玛派的重要教法来源。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 11th century, hundreds of tertöns (treasure revealers) have indeed appeared in Tibetan Buddhism, retrieving terma teachings from various locations. Famous tertöns include Nyangral Nyima Özer (11th century) and Chokgyur Lingpa (19th century). The terma tradition continues to this day and is a major source of Nyingma teachings.

prophecies.a: 「我涅槃后，正法住世五百年，像法住世一千年，末法住世一万年。末法之时，我之教法唯余形式，修证者如凤毛麟角。然有一人发真实心修行，其功德胜正法时代千百人。」
prophecies.q_en: Shakyamuni Buddha's prophecy of the Dharma-ending age
prophecies.a_en: "After my parinirvana, the True Dharma will endure for 500 years, the Semblance Dharma for 1,000 years, and the Ending Dharma for 10,000 years. In the end of the Dharma, only the forms of my teaching will remain, and genuine practitioners will be exceedingly rare. Yet one person who practices with a true heart in that age will generate more merit than thousands in the age of True Dharma."
